pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 114: cat > "$PROJECT_DIR/docker-compose.yml"; export_result.sh line 10 references same file
setup_task.sh lines 118-143 define these three services in docker-compose.yml; verifier.py line 44 validates all three services
task.json description line 5 specifies 'use pg_isready -U postgres'; verifier.py line 55 checks for 'pg_isready' in healthcheck test command
setup_task.sh line 57 defines Flask app running on port 5000; line 38 defines /health route; export_result.sh line 32 tests this exact URL

privileged_info_summary: The docker_compose_wait_strategy task is an educational exercise using synthetic, auto-generated data. It creates a Docker Compose project at /home/ga/projects/ci-pipeline with three services (db, seeder, backend) defined in docker-compose.yml. The backend Flask application runs on port 5000 with a /health endpoint. The task requires adding a healthcheck using 'pg_isready' to the PostgreSQL db service and configuring proper service dependencies in docker-compose.yml to eliminate race conditions. All project files are generated by setup_task.sh; only the base Docker images (postgres:14 and python:3.9-slim) are sourced externally from Docker Hub.
